lyrics: To find, to find the exact words, to find the perfect words, to say less, but to say more, was ideal with this project, and to let my energy and mind be felt, in a less aggressive way, but a more passive and genius way was ideal with this album, to show the versatility and to show the open-to-open minds in itself was the goal of this album, and to acquire a large amount of passion, and love and appreciation for myself was the goal of this album; loyalty to myself was the goal of this album.
